title: eupatorium rugosum var. angustatum
intro: Eupatorium rugosum var. angustatum, also known as narrow-leaved Joe Pye weed, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like coughs and bronchitis. Eupatorium rugosum var. angustatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
